introSection: Dragon Legend is a Maurer Rides built sit-down launched roller coaster located at Romon U-Park in Yingzhou, Ningbo, Zheijang, China.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 5 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 20 riders per train.

fullText:
Dragon Legend is a Maurer Rides built sit-down launched roller coaster located at Romon U-Park in Yingzhou, Ningbo, Zheijang, China.



5 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 20 riders per train.
